Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia. Total protein and globulin are low, possibly indicating malnutrition or protein loss. Lipid profile reveals elevated triglycerides and LDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Liver enzymes and other electrolytes are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal function, nutritional status, and cardiovascular risk are recommended.
